title: Auto command template forbids inferring a goal when no session exists
expectedSnippets: Do not derive, infer, or invent a new goal from repository inspection
forbiddenSnippets: infer a goal from repository inspection

title: Auto command template keeps resume-only behavior explicit when no active session exists
expectedSnippets: If no active session exists, stop and request a goal
forbiddenSnippets: resume can create a new goal

title: Auto command template stops on recommend_confirm or human_required decision gates
expectedSnippets: present that recommendation clearly and stop

title: Auto command template requires final review workflow before completion
expectedSnippets: Before final completion, run broad repo validation

title: Final completion path explicitly includes completionPolicy.minCompletedFeatures
expectedSnippets: even when other plan features remain pending
forbiddenSnippets: all plan features must be completed

title: Plan command template preserves approve/select routing before treating arguments as a new goal
expectedSnippets: Otherwise treat the full argument string as the planning goal
forbiddenSnippets: treat approve or select as a new planning goal
